vulnerabilities.description: X-Content-Type-Options header not set
vulnerabilities.remediation: Set X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff

vulnerabilities.description: X-Frame-Options header not set
vulnerabilities.remediation: Set X-Frame-Options: DENY or SAMEORIGIN

vulnerabilities.description: Content-Security-Policy header not set
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement a strict Content Security Policy

vulnerabilities.description: X-XSS-Protection header not set (legacy but still useful)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Set X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block

vulnerabilities.description: Referrer-Policy header not set
vulnerabilities.remediation: Set Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

vulnerabilities.description: Permissions-Policy header not set
vulnerabilities.remediation: Define a Permissions-Policy to control browser features

vulnerabilities.description: Server header exposes server technology
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove or obscure the Server header

vulnerabilities.description: X-Powered-By header exposes framework information
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove the X-Powered-By header

vulnerabilities.description: The application is served over unencrypted HTTP
vulnerabilities.remediation: Enable HTTPS and redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS

vulnerabilities.description: Page can be embedded in iframes on any domain, enabling clickjacking attacks.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add X-Frame-Options: DENY or SAMEORIGIN header. Better yet, use CSP frame-ancestors directive.

vulnerabilities.description: Administrative interface is accessible. Should be restricted to authorized users.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Restrict access to admin panels via IP whitelisting or VPN.

vulnerabilities.description: Administrative interface is accessible. Should be restricted to authorized users.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Restrict access to admin panels via IP whitelisting or VPN.

vulnerabilities.description: Discovered accessible path: /.idea/
vulnerabilities.remediation: Review if this path should be publicly accessible.

vulnerabilities.description: Discovered accessible path: /crossdomain.xml
vulnerabilities.remediation: Review if this path should be publicly accessible.

vulnerabilities.description: Discovered accessible path: /clientaccesspolicy.xml
vulnerabilities.remediation: Review if this path should be publicly accessible.

vulnerabilities.description: Discovered accessible path: /images/
vulnerabilities.remediation: Review if this path should be publicly accessible.

vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement proper input validation and output encoding. Use Content-Security-Policy headers.

vulnerabilities.evidence:
Error message indicates XXE processing: <!DOCTYPE HTML PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD HTML 4.01 Transitional//EN"
"http://www.w3.org/TR/html4/loose.dtd
vulnerabilities.description: The application may be vulnerable to blind XXE attacks.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable external entity and DTD processing.
